pi_items.source: Task description step 2: 'enter Planted corn in field A as the Name'
Task description step 3 states log type should be 'Activity' (default); verified as real farmOS log type via https://farmos.org/guide/logs/ and https://v1.farmos.org/guide/logs/

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Activity log with the name 'Planted corn in field A' using the farmOS Field Kit app. Activity is the default and real log type in farmOS, used for general farm activity planning and record-keeping. The test data is synthetic, created during task execution on a clean Android emulator running the offline-first Field Kit app (package: org.farmos.app).
